perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a Costco aisle where a woman wearing a brown jacket and a plaid skirt is standing in front of a bread display; she smiles and picks up a large package containing four grain-covered baguettes. (2) She holds the bread package toward the camera, pointing at the seeds on the surface while another hand enters the frame from the left to point at the label; her expression is enthusiastic as she speaks. (3) She continues to hold the bread, gesturing toward the display shelf filled with more of the same product, maintaining eye contact with the camera and smiling broadly throughout the demonstration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A cheerful, high-pitched female voice starts the video with an excited exclamation about a product being back in stock. (2) A steady, friendly male voice joins the conversation off-camera, discussing the price of 299 and the quality of the ingredients; the background features an upbeat, mid-tempo lo-fi pop track. (3) The female voice resumes the lead, emphasizing the health benefits while muffled ambient supermarket sounds (carts, distant chatter) are heard beneath the dominant vocals and music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '回來了' (It's back) in large red and white bubble letters. (3) Functional Text: '歐式高纖穀粒長棍麵包 四個299' (European High Fiber Grain Baguette, four for 299) displayed in a red banner. (4) Decorative Text: '滿滿的健康' (Full of health) with a yellow megaphone icon and heart emojis.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 hand of an off-screen male filmmaker, and 1-2 blurred shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown jacket with a fur-lined hood over a light-colored top and a grey plaid skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior featuring commercial refrigerated display cases, metal shelving units, and various packaged food items.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation to inform viewers that a popular 'high-fiber grain baguette' has returned to Costco. It highlights the value (4 pieces for 299), the healthy ingredients (visible seeds), and uses an enthusiastic tone to encourage viewers to purchase the item before it goes out of stock again.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is specifically showcasing a product from a known retailer (Costco) with detailed price and nutritional claims.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast 'Variety Show' style text hooks and a 'Return Alert' theme common in retail influencer content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets value-conscious and health-conscious shoppers who frequent warehouse clubs like Costco.
